levels.name: Critical platform compromise
levels.description: Active compromise, data exfiltration, or broad authentication or authorization bypass affecting production.

levels.name: High-risk exploitable vulnerability
levels.description: Credible exploit path with significant user or operator impact, but no confirmed active compromise.

levels.name: Moderate production security issue
levels.description: Scoped security weakness requiring engineering action without urgent platform-wide containment.

levels.name: Low-risk hardening or process issue
levels.description: Defense-in-depth gap, policy drift, or low-impact defect best handled through normal backlog flow.
